name: @ctox/pi-coding-sidecar
description: CTOX pi-code coding sidecar. Headless port of the Pi coding-agent (Upstream Pi v0.80.2), driven by CTOX over LocalTransport. ExecutionEnv projects Business OS app source (business_module_source_files); provider routes through the CTOX model gateway. Derived from MRP-learn-buddy packages/agent-runtime.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=dist/ctox-pi-sidecar.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire as __ctoxCreateRequire } from 'module'; const require = __ctoxCreateRequire(import.meta.url); // CTOX pi-coding sidecar; self-contained; upstream Pi v0.80.2"
